logs.heading: A0: Setting DAYS=2 for Saturday and starting Gmail sync

thoughts: Today is Saturday, 2026-03-28. According to the rules: Tuesday-Saturday means DAYS=2.
I need to run the Gmail reader script with --days 2.
The script takes 5-15 minutes, so I'll start it and then monitor it using tail every 30 seconds up to 10 times.
On completion or failure, I'll send a notification via the notify.py script.
